Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Interface InstantiationProposer

All Known Implementing Classes:
InnerVariableNamer, InstantiationProposerCollection, VariableNameProposer, VariableNamer
public interface InstantiationProposer
Provides proposals for schema variable instantiations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getProposal(TacletApp app, SchemaVariable var, Services services, Node undoAnchor, ImmutableList<String> previousProposals)
    Returns an instantiation proposal for the schema variable var.

  • Method Details

    • getProposal

      String getProposal(TacletApp app, SchemaVariable var, Services services, Node undoAnchor, ImmutableList<String> previousProposals)
      Returns an instantiation proposal for the schema variable var.
      Parameters:
      app - the taclet app
      var - the schema variable to be instantiated
      services - pointer to services object
      undoAnchor - node to be used as undo anchor
      previousProposals - a list of other proposals which should be taken into account (e.g. for name uniqueness), or null
